item.name: Wind-up Delivery Moogle
item.description:
For when you absolutely, positively require moogle accompaniment.

Use item to acquire the wind-up delivery moogle minion.
item.tooltip:
Behold, for I shall now
perform for you the moogle
dance of inimitable integrity!
   - Delivery Moogle
item.specialactiondescription:
Reduces DEF of all enemies within range by 25%.
Duration: 6s
